# Dr. Nicole Hani — Clinical Psychologist in Lebanon

> Senior Lebanese clinical psychologist (PhD, USEK) with 30+ years of practice. CBT therapist treating children, adults, and couples in Beirut, Zouk Mosbeh, and Mount Lebanon. Sessions in Arabic, English, and French.

Dr. Nicole Absi Hani is a leading clinical psychologist in Lebanon. She holds a State PhD (1st category) in Clinical Psychology from Holy Spirit University of Kaslik (USEK) and is certified in Cognitive Behavioural Therapy from Hôpital Sainte-Anne, Paris. Since 1996 she has led her private practice in Zouk Mosbeh and serves as Professor of Neuropsychology at Saint Joseph University and Lebanese University, consultant psychologist at Aboujaoudé Hospital and Saint Joseph University Hospital, and forensic expert with the Maronite Spiritual Court.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://drnicolehani.vercel.app/): Overview, hero portrait, services, recent press features, contact
- [About](https://drnicolehani.vercel.app/about): Full biography, academic credentials, hospital affiliations
- [Services](https://drnicolehani.vercel.app/services): Children & Adolescents, Adult Therapy & CBT, Couple & Family Therapy, Psychometric Testing & Reports
- [Insights / Blog](https://drnicolehani.vercel.app/blog): Articles on school anxiety, CBT explained, couples listening, post-crisis mental health in Lebanon
- [Contact / Book a session](https://drnicolehani.vercel.app/contact): Online booking form, WhatsApp, three clinic locations

## Practice details
- **Phone**: +961 71 635 800 (WhatsApp + voice)
- **Email**: nicoleabsi71@gmail.com
- **Languages**: Arabic, English, French
- **Session fee**: USD 80–120 (sliding scale available)
- **Format**: In-person at Zouk Mosbeh, video sessions also available
- **No referral required**

## Locations
1. **Private Clinic** — Salamé & Rizk Building, Zouk Mosbeh, Lebanon · +961 71 635 800
2. **Saint Joseph University Hospital** — Dora, Beirut · +961 1 240 111 ext. 1170 / 1171
3. **Aboujaoudé Hospital** — Jal El Dib, Mount Lebanon · +961 4 718 000 ext. 6100 (Wednesdays 12:00–16:00)

## Specialties
- Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT) — adult depression, anxiety, burnout, grief, life transitions, self-esteem
- Children & adolescents — ADHD and learning difficulty management, school refusal, anxiety, emotional and social skills development, parent guidance
- Couple & family therapy — conflict resolution, pre-marital counseling, separation & co-parenting
- Psychometric testing — Intelligence (IQ) tests, Personality Assessment, Child & Adolescent Assessment, TOVA (attention), Neuropsychological tests, Symptom Rating Scales

## Press features
- Sky News Arabia · Eating disorders and their psychological impact
- Sky News Arabia · Mental health in times of crisis
- LBC Lebanon · ADHD, school performance, and treatment
- Al Jadeed TV · How the crisis is affecting children's mental health
- MTV Lebanon · Lebanon's current conditions and rising suicide cases
- MTV Lebanon · Purchasing power and mental health during the holiday season

## Recognition
Saint Joseph University · Saint Joseph University Hospital · Lebanese University · Aboujaoudé Hospital · UNICEF Lebanon · Ministry of Education · Maronite Spiritual Court · Lebanese Order of Psychologists.
